@@ -97,19 +97,22 @@ Current `main` already covers the request: the Control UI supports editing cron
 
 ## Close Comment
 
-Closing as implemented on `main` after a Codex review of current `main` (cec34821754a).
+Closing this as implemented after Codex review.
 
-Current `main` already covers the request: the Control UI supports editing cron jobs and viewing run history, and current cron runtime/docs support orchestration-style isolated runs. The changelog records the web cron editor and all-jobs run history as shipped in `v2026.2.22`.
+The web cron UI already has the core workflow requested here: cron jobs can be edited from Control UI, run history is visible, and the backend exposes the matching update/run-history methods. This shipped in `v2026.2.22`, and current `main` still has the implementation.
+
+What I checked:
+- `CHANGELOG.md:4075` records full Control UI cron edit parity plus all-jobs run history shipping in `v2026.2.22`.
+- `docs/web/control-ui.md:113` documents list/add/edit/run/enable/disable and run history for cron jobs.
+- `ui/src/ui/views/cron.ts:1502` exposes the `Edit` and `History` actions in the cron UI.
+- `ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.ts:718` wires edits to `cron.update`.
+- `src/gateway/server-methods/cron.ts:391` serves cron run history, including paged/filterable history.
+- `ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.test.ts:379` covers editing existing jobs and loading paged run history.
+
+So I’m closing this as already implemented rather than keeping a duplicate feature request open.
 
-Evidence:
-- **Release note shipped:** The `2026.2.22` changelog entry explicitly says Control UI/Cron added full web cron edit parity plus all-jobs run history with pagination, search, sort, and multi-filter controls. (`CHANGELOG.md:4075`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Control UI docs:** The Control UI docs list cron jobs as supporting list/add/edit/run/enable/disable plus run history. (`docs/web/control-ui.md:113`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Web UI exposes edit/history actions:** Cron job cards in the current web UI include `Edit` and `History` actions. (`ui/src/ui/views/cron.ts:1502`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Edit path calls cron.update:** When editing an existing job, the controller sends `cron.update` and exits edit mode after save. (`ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.ts:718`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Run history is wired end-to-end:** The UI controller loads paged run history, and the gateway `cron.runs` method supports both per-job and all-job history pages with filters and pagination. (`src/gateway/server-methods/cron.ts:391`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Regression coverage exists:** Tests cover editing existing jobs and loading/appending paged run history in the web cron controller. (`ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.test.ts:379`, `cec34821754a`)
+Codex evidence: reviewed against `cec34821754a`; fixed in `v2026.2.22`.
 
-Codex evidence: Reviewed against main [cec34821754a](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2). Fix evidence: release [v2026.2.22](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.2.22).
 
 ## GitHub Snapshot
